arts.ttl: “Active talks” – Chelsea decide to let midfielder leave, Euro giants “pushing” for signing
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly ready to let Carney Chukwuemeka leave the club this January, having opened the door for a potential loan departure. That’s according to Fabrizio Romano, who has also posted on X about Borussia Dortmund entering into active talks and pushing to sign Chukwuemeka. arts.ttl: Chelsea make Mathys Tel transfer move as Christopher Nkunku Bayern Munich reality becomes clear
arts.sum: Chelsea would make an offer for Tel should Bayern give the Blues any sort of encouragement that the teenage forward is available this month. Chelsea have been in contact with Bayern Munich over a possible deal to sign Mathys Tel this month, football.london understands.

arts.ttl: Maresca AXES Chelsea star as Romano reveals 'important' suitors
arts.sum: Speculation surrounding Disasi has swirled for weeks and Fabrizio Romano has now confirmed that the player looks set to leave Chelsea after talking with the club hierarchy. Disasi has on several occasions captained Chelsea's 'B Team' - the squad that features in Europe and the cups - but Premier League game time has been hard to come by, with the versatile defender only making five appearances.

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Bournemouth could be without 17 players for crucial Premier League clash
arts.sum: "Chelsea Football Club can confirm the Football Association recently contacted our player Mykhailo Mudryk concerning an adverse finding in a routine urine test," the club statement began . Between Chelsea and Bournemouth, there could be a number of key players that miss out on Tuesday night's crunch Premier League clash at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea wait on Premier League PSR update as ideal transfer solution found
arts.sum: The Premier League will make an announcement over any breaches of Profitability and Sustainability Rules (PSRs) on Tuesday, with Chelsea one of the clubs that has been spoken about over the last few months.
